# Filip Sipos

> Personal portfolio of Filip Sipos, a senior full-stack developer based in Europe (UTC+01:00) working across the stack focusing on TypeScript, React, Next, Nest and AWS infra. The site collects selected work and writing on software engineering.

## Writing

- [Writing index](https://filipsipos.dev/writing): all published articles
